title: Knight Transportation, Cummins, and Clean Energy Demonstrate Potential of Ultra-Low Carbon Fuel Through Cummins X15N Natural Gas Powertrains in California

title: Cummins: A Dividend Growth Stock That Can Keep Your Portfolio Trucking Along
text: Cummins' diluted EPS payout ratio is poised to improve from the high 30% range in 2022 to the low 30% range in 2023. The company logged double-digit net sales and diluted EPS growth through the first half of the year. Cummins' admirable financial positioning earns it solidly investment-grade credit ratings from S&P and Moody's.

title: Better Dividend Stock to Buy? Caterpillar Stock or Cummins Stock
text: Investing in dividend stocks can help you increase your wealth in the long run.

title: Hyliion and Cummins Receive Certification From the California Air Resource Board for the Hypertruck ERX Electric Powertrain
text: AUSTIN, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hyliion Holdings Corp. (NYSE: HYLN) (“Hyliion”), a leader in electrified solutions for Class 8 semi-trucks, and Cummins Inc. (NYSE: CMI) (“Cummins”), a global power solutions provider, today announced the two companies together have successfully obtained the Dual Executive Order from the California Air Resources Board (CARB) for the Hypertruck ERX powertrain paired with the Cummins ISX12N engine. “This certification is pivotal to commercializing our Hypertruck ER.

title: Terex Advance Signs Letter of Intent to Integrate and Offer Cummins X15H
text: COLUMBUS, Ind.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #cummins--Cummins Inc. (NYSE: CMI), a global power solutions provider and Terex® Advance, leading manufacturer of front-discharge concrete mixer trucks, announced today the signing of a Letter of Intent (LOI) to integrate Cummins' X15H hydrogen internal combustion engines into the Terex Advance Commander Series. “As the global need to reduce emissions becomes stronger, we are actively pursuing practical, cost-effective strategies to help our ready-mix customers decarboniz.

title: Cummins (CMI), PACCAR (PCAR) and Daimler Form a Battery JV
text: Cummins (CMI), PACCAR (PCAR) and Daimler collaborate for battery cell production in the United States.

title: Cummins: 5 Factors Make This A Strong Buy
text: The revenue and net income growth for Cummins is good. Free cash flow growth has lulled the last three years due to expenditures on Meritor Acquisition. Their balance sheet is healthy from a Net Debt/EBIDTA basis even with a recent spike of this metric, due to the same acquisition. They have an excellent share repurchase program and minimal stock-based compensation, providing more value for the investor.

title: Cummins, Daimler form joint venture for battery cell production in US
text: Accelera, a zero-emissions business unit of Cummins , and Daimler Trucks & Buses US Holding said on Wednesday they formed a joint venture to advance battery cell production in the United States.

title: Accelera by Cummins, Daimler Truck and PACCAR Form a Joint Venture to Advance Battery Cell Production in The United States
text: COLUMBUS, Ind. & PORTLAND, Ore. & BELLEVUE, Wash.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Accelera by Cummins, the zero-emissions business unit of Cummins Inc. [NYSE: CMI], Daimler Trucks & Buses US Holding LLC (a Daimler Truck Group Company; DAX: DTR0CK; “Daimler Truck”) and PACCAR [NASDAQ: PCAR] are partnering to accelerate and localize battery cell production and the battery supply chain in the United States. title: Accelera by Cummins, Daimler Truck and PACCAR form a joint venture to advance battery cell production in the United States
text: COLUMBUS, Ind. & PORTLAND, Ore. & BELLEVUE, Wash.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Accelera by Cummins, the zero-emissions business unit of Cummins Inc. title: Cummins And Two Truck Giants Will Pour $3 Billion Into A Battery Venture
text: The biggest diesel engine maker, Daimler and Paccar plan to open the biggest venture in North America making battery cells tailored to commercial vehicles.

title: 3 Up-and-Coming Hydrogen Stocks to Put on Your Must-Buy List
text: The Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) passed by the Biden Administration in 2022 provides both tax incentives and subsidies to clean energy projects. Given the encompassing nature of the IRA, those subsidies would also be given to hydrogen projects, initially prompting some investors to give hydrogen stocks another look.
